articles.title: Arsenal capitalise on defensive errors  to secure first leg win over Lyon
articles.summary: Arsenal pounce on a pair of defensive errors to come from behind to defeat Lyon 2-1 at the Emirates Stadium, in the first leg of their Women's Champions League semi-final.

articles.title: Record-equalling Kerr helps Chelsea dominate Everton
articles.summary: Sam Kerr scores twice to join former teammate Fran Kirby in being Chelsea's joint all-time top goalscorer in the WSL, as Sonia Bompastor's side soundly defeat Everton 4-1 at Goodison Park.

articles.title: Man Utd's Champions League hopes dealt a blow in stalemate with Tottenham
articles.summary: Manchester United's Champions League hopes were dealt a heavy blow after a 0-0 draw with Tottenham Hotspur to leave the Red Devils four points behind second-placed Chelsea, with two games to play.
